 * SkillsCard — Class Component (demonstrates Component API + Constructor)
 *
 * Concepts covered:

 */import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";class SkillsCard extends Component{constructor(props){super(props);// Local state — tracks which category tab is active

setTimeout(()=>this.setState({visible:true}),100);}render(){const{categories}=this.props;const{activeTab,visible}=this.state;const current=categories[activeTab];return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:`skills-card ${visible?"skills-card--visible":""}`,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{className:"skills-card__heading",children:"Tools & Skills"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"skills-tabs",children:categories.map((cat,i)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:`skills-tab ${i===activeTab?"skills-tab--active":""}`,onClick:()=>this.setState({activeTab:i}),children:cat.label},cat.label))}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("ul",{className:"skills-list",children:current.skills.map(skill=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("li",{className:"skills-item",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"skills-dot"}),skill]},skill))})]});}}// PropTypes validation — documents + enforces what this component expects
// Default props — fallback if parent doesn't pass anything
SkillsCard.defaultProps={categories:[{label:"Software",skills:["DaVinci Resolve","Adobe Premiere Pro","After Effects","Lightroom","Photoshop","Figma"]}]};export default SkillsCard;
